0.details:
Uncle John was like a father figure to me
He was the life of the party and a glue of the family
Uncle John was well respected at his workplace
The community loved him and valued his opinion
We have truly lost a gem
0.model_generation:
Dear family and friends,

I was deeply saddened to hear of Uncle John’s passing. He was so much more than an uncle; he was a father figure who offered wisdom, warmth, and unwavering support at every stage of my life. His laughter filled every gathering, lighting up the room and binding our family together with joy. Beyond our circle, he earned immense respect at his workplace, where his dedication and integrity set an inspiring example. The community treasured him, always seeking his valued insights and guidance.

Please accept my heartfelt condolences during this difficult time. I will forever cherish memories of his kindness, vibrant spirit, and the countless moments he made feel special. Though he may be gone, his love and legacy will continue to guide and uplift us. We have truly lost a gem, but his remarkable life will never be forgotten.

With deepest sympathy,  
Your grateful nephew
0.final_version: I did not recognize how uncle John was suffering in silence because of his sickness, due to being secretive but yet strong. He always wanted to appear strong and to be the pillar of the family, and his brother Andrew knew it. Uncle John was like a father figure to me and to all his children that he has left behind. He loved to play music and dance, that is why he was always the life of the party and he loved bringing all the family members together to enjoy and have some fun. This is how we got to learn how to love one another as children and take to care of each other as well. Uncle John was an outstanding policeman. Before he died, he achieved his dream to be a Captain. He was a provider and a protector at heart, that is why the community loved him, feared him and valued his opinion or advice. I feel so torn Andrew, because we have truly lost a gem and may his soul rest in eternal peace. My condolences to Andrew and the family.

1.details:
Cloudy is not getting any family assistance
She does not have anyone to talk to and vent
She needs help and support
I try to support her where I can and lend her an ear
I motivate and encourage her about life
1.model_generation: Hey Cloudy, I know things feel isolating and heavy right now. I want you to know you are not alone. Even when it seems like there’s no one there to listen, I’m here and ready to hear anything you need to share. Your feelings matter, and it’s okay to let them out—anger, sadness, confusion. You don’t have to carry this burden on your own. Every step you take, no matter how small, is progress toward brighter days. It’s perfectly okay to ask for help, lean on others, and take time for yourself. When life feels overwhelming, remember that storms don’t last forever. There is strength in vulnerability and courage in reaching out. You have a caring friend who believes in your resilience and potential. We’ll navigate this journey together, one moment at a time. Better days are ahead, and you deserve all the support and kindness in the world.
1.final_version: Cloudy is a good friend of mine that contacted me recently to share with me about her experiences at home. She told me how she is not getting any family assistance and support. She asked if she could speak to me because she has no one to talk to about her situation, so sometimes she would like to vent. Cloudy explained to me as a friend what she is going through and detailed the kind of help and support that she needs to get through. So as a friend I told her how I will try to help her in areas of her life that I can, and that I am always here to lend her an ear. I motivated her a lot and encouraged her about life. I reassured her that her life would be okay as long as she would take things one step at a time. We discussed her strengths and then I told her to focus on them more and not on the negative.

2.details:
Thank you to God for saving me
There were seasons of loneliness at times
I was in need of help and I got it
There were times when I was sick and I got healed
2.model_generation:
Dear God,

I offer my deepest thanks for your unwavering grace and mercy. In seasons of loneliness, when I felt abandoned and afraid, you were my comfort and my light. Your presence lifted me from despair and reminded me that I am never truly alone.

When I reached out in desperation, seeking help I could not provide myself, you answered. You sent encouragement through friends, family, and unexpected blessings that sustained me through my darkest hours. In moments of illness and weakness, you carried me to health, restoring not only my body but also my spirit.

Thank you for saving me in ways big and small, for guiding each step of this journey, and for surrounding me with love beyond measure. I rejoice in your endless love and look forward to walking with you in all seasons ahead.

With profound gratitude,  
Your grateful child
2.final_version:
Dear God,

I offer my deepest thanks for your unconditional and constant love because you have saved me, and therefore saved my life. There were times of seasons of loneliness, when I felt abandoned and afraid, and you were there to comfort me. You protected me at all times, even when I doubted you, God.

When I was seeking for help and I could not take care of myself, you helped me. You sent strangers my way, and I received unexpected blessings, in that moment I knew it was you, God. There were times when I was sick, but you came through for me and you healed me. You made sure that I was well taken care off.

Thank you for saving me in good times and bad, for guiding me in each step of this journey that I am in, and for surrounding me with love beyond measure. 

With much appreciation,  
Your daughter

3.details:
You are my one true love and my soulmate
We have been together through thick and thin
We were made for each other
I will never leave your side because we are the best of friends
3.model_generation: My love, from the moment our paths crossed, I felt a spark that time only fueled. You are my one true love and my soulmate. Together we've weathered laughter and tears, joy and trials, finding strength in each storm. You lift me up, challenge me to grow, and remind me what it means to love without reservation. We were made for each other, two hearts woven by fate. Today, I promise to stand by your side as your partner, your confidant, and your best friend. I vow to celebrate your triumphs, comfort you in sorrow, and share every ordinary moment that becomes extraordinary simply because we're together. I will never leave your side; our bond is unbreakable. I will cherish each sunrise we share and every evening in your arms; with you, every day is a blessing. With all that I am, I join my life to yours, now and forevermore.
3.final_version: My love, from the moment we met, I felt a connection that time only fueled. Now that we are here today sharing our wedding vows, I can see you are my one true love and my soulmate. Together we have stood the test of time, and finding strength in each other. You show me love without limits. We were made for each other, two hearts woven together by fate. Today, I promise to stand by your side as your partner, your confidant, and your best friend. I vow to celebrate you and to respect you in every way. I will never leave your side, because our bond is undeniable. I will value every moment with you and accept you as you are. Every day is a blessing with you because you are my best friend. I love you now and forever.

4.details:
How are you doing old friend
Long time no see,
I hope you are doing well
Something happened the other day and it reminded me of you
I got that dream job we talked about
4.model_generation:
Hi there,

Long time no see! I hope you’re doing well. Something happened the other day that reminded me of our talks and your hilarious stories. I ran into the same coffee shop we used to visit, and I couldn’t help but laugh remembering your epic latte art attempts. Speaking of memories, I’ve got big news: I landed that dream job we always talked about! I’m starting next month at the design agency, and I can’t wait to dive in. It feels surreal to finally see our conversations turn into reality. Outside of work, I’ve also been exploring hiking trails and picking up guitar lessons. Your encouragement back then meant the world to me.

I’d love to hear what you’ve been up to. Let’s catch up soon—maybe grab a coffee or jump on a call one evening. Looking forward to reconnecting and sharing more stories. Take care, and talk soon!

Cheers,
4.final_version:
Hey, old friend

Long time no see! I hope you’re doing well. Something happened the other day that reminded me of our talks and your funny stories. I ran into the same school we went to, and I couldn’t help but laugh remembering you joking in the class. Speaking of memories, I’ve got some big news: I landed that dream job we always talked about! I’m starting next month at the design agency, and I can’t wait. Outside of work, I’ve also been going out to have some fun. Your friendship has meant a lot to me and has made me go down memory lane these past few weeks.

I’d love to hear what you’ve been up to. Let’s catch up soon—maybe grab a drink. Looking forward to talking again and sharing more stories. Take care, friend bye!

Cheers,

5.details:
Congratulations on your 30th birthday
You have grown to be a fine young man
You must know that you are truly loved
Go out there and show the world what you've got
5.model_generation: Today, we gather to celebrate your 30th birthday, an incredible milestone marking three decades of laughter, growth, and love. From your first steps to the confident stride you take now, you have grown into a fine young man whose kindness and determination inspire everyone around you. You have faced challenges with grace, embraced opportunities with courage, and nurtured relationships with warmth and generosity. Always know you are truly loved—by family who cheered every success, friends who stood by you in every storm, and by all of us who believe in your potential. As you embark on this new chapter, keep that spark of curiosity alive, hold fast to your dreams, and never doubt your worth. Go out there and show the world what you’ve got. May endless adventures await. Your journey has only just begun, and we can’t wait to see the incredible things you will achieve. Happy 30th birthday!
5.final_version: Today, we gather to celebrate your 30th birthday, an incredible milestone, showcasing years and years of love. From your young age, you have grown to be a fine young man whose kindness and determination inspires everyone around you. You have faced challenges and taken care of others with love. Always know you are truly loved—by family, friends who stood by you all the way. As you go into this new chapter, hold fast to your dreams, and never doubt your faith. Go out there and show the world what you’ve got. Your journey has just started, and we can’t wait to see the incredible things you will achieve. Happy 30th birthday!

post_survey.feedback: it was interesting. To make the study short, reduce the number of words more.
